stories.headline: Patient tested for suspected Ebola virus at Glasgow hospital
stories.description: It is understood a patient was admitted to the Queen Elizabeth University Hospital during the early hours of Tuesday.

stories.headline: Birthright citizenship ruling: US officials, lawmakers and advocates react
stories.description: Trump calls top court’s ruling affirming birthright citizenship ‘too bad for country’ as advocates cheer decision.

stories.headline: England vs DR Congo: World Cup Round of 32: Kane, match prediction, lineups
stories.description: Title contenders England, led by Harry Kane, face Yoane Wissa’s DR Congo, as the teams fight for a place in the last-16.

stories.headline: At least 14 children killed after roof of Pakistan tuition centre collapses
stories.description: One teacher and eight other children also injured after incident in Lahore.

stories.headline: Elle: Is the Legally Blonde revival 'boring and tedious' or a 'hot pink delight'?
stories.description: The spin-off introduces a new generation to Elle Woods, but critics say young people deserve better.
